name: charity-net
description: Connecting people, charities, and the world

scripts.build: pnpm -r --filter './shared' build && pnpm -r --filter './server' build && pnpm -r --filter './client' build
scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,server,client,emulators -c blue,magenta,cyan,yellow "pnpm dev:shared" "pnpm dev:server" "pnpm dev:client" "pnpm dev:emulators"
scripts.deploy:server: gcloud run deploy charity-net-api --source server --region europe-west1
